long_description:

TIP Short Description: A kube-proxy-qz56h is not ready for the past 10 minutes

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge:node:dal1-qz6-sr6-rk053-s38

Event Generated:

Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"kube-proxy.*|device-agent.*|compute-agent.*"}) by (kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) < 1 = 0.9286
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-edge' and kube_pod_name = 'kube-proxy-qz56h'

Time:             12/04/2025 11:46 AM UTC
